action.description:
Introduced by Senators Roys, L. Johnson, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Hesselbein, Larson, Ratcliff and Spreitzer; 
cosponsored by Representatives Subeck, Snodgrass, Mayadev, Taylor, Anderson, Arney, Bare, Brown, Clancy, DeSmidt, Fitzgerald, Kirsch, Joers, Madison, Neubauer, Palmeri, Phelps, Rivera-Wagner, Sinicki, Stroud and Stubbs
